reviews.review_text: This game is a hidden gem, a friend of mine recommended it and it looked fun, oh boy. YOU MUST MOD THE GAME, it becomes really fun like even more fun, i used a mod to set the amount of rounds, this way you can do as many as you want and it gets really funny like shooting atomic bombs infinitely with the correct cards, I also recommend ROUNDS with FRIENDS, it lets you play with your friends Online and it is pretty funny, We play a lot and let me tell you the laughs are a side effect that will be there.
its good but basic, i recomend mods to spice it up
if the player base was larger this would be an extremely fun game, it still is but there can be very long waittime
overall great game only thing is it takes a while to find a match via quick match sometimes
Love ROUNDS! Such a great 1v1 game with fun and interesting builds! If you like party games and creating cool and interesting builds, play this!
bro if you can find a friend to play this with, this can become your most played couch coop game. Also, most of the time I've played is on coop.
Pretty good pvp game, better than stickman battle for sure
Very fun, easy when you get the hang of it, but it comes with challenge.
fun game, very enjoyable but sometimes toxic players lol
Highly underrated game. Though it could use more cards and maps since you can only play so much before seeing it all
Pretty good game but pc players often aim better than controller players

One of the most slept on games ever, yeah its a little boring playing vanilla, but you NEED to get thunderstore to mod this game. This game will always be a top 10 for me, laughing for hours with friends over how we can break this game and push it to its absolute limits. Best party game ever made.
combos you can make are insane requires skill but the better the build the less required meaning it can be as hard or as easy as you make it.
its fun with friends and its a cool game with diffrenet sets u can choose from many cards

One of the most hilarious fighting games, its funny when u get a whole bunch of upgrades that work really well together and become super broken, only for ur friend to then get a broken build the next game and u understand what they went through, its so peak.
W Game its a BANGER especually playing with friends or with mods also 100% is really easy if you like achievments
very great game if you can buy it get its very cheap for a fun game.

Its an amazing game, but I feel it's been largely abandoned and it seems very buggy on linux, as well as just generally being laggy overall.
Also it's very hard to find a person online ( takes a while ) so generally i only play local or occasionally with friends ( which has also been annoying ).
I feel a tad sad that i had to leave a negative review on such a chaotic and ohnesly quite fun game, but i found the problems needed addressing more.
Awesome game except the devs are done updating (Pretty sure) They could just be working on a massive update or they are working on one of they`re bigger games
really fun game but wish there was more and longer than 5 round game modes without mods
very fun game, sadly not the most people online but enough to get a match within a minute (most times), its a very fun battle game kinda like a better deckbuilder version of bopl battle :D
Super fun to play with friends, gets VERY chaotic sometimes.
I have played this game religiously and I highly recommend it. great couch coop fun and I highly recommend using mods, especially the coop mod.

Really fun game and I love the concept. Its similiar to stick fight game but is really diffrent in a way. I love it!
Highly reccomend! Especially with friends!!!
Wow this game is repetitive, and that doesn’t even matter! This game is very replayable but I imagine it is much worse without a friend to play with. Worth the cost.

Rounds is a genuinely  AMAZING game for the price, and you can make chaos in sandbox mode. I only have a few complaints, one being that occasionally matchmaking takes FOREVER, another that rounds aren't long enough (you can't get many cards normally), and it's lackluster without mods, which some people straight up can't access! Still a great game, worth the price.
Very fun when you play with mods. I which the mod support was better, it's kind of a pain to set up but still very fun.
Great game, starts normal then slowly descends into total chaos
fun game that you can always come to and almost never gets old but the only small issue might be the waiting times because sometimes you just cant find a match at all
It's very fun and I love the explosive abilities who need graphics when the gameplay is to fun?

fun game
play modded
very good modding community
Easy, simple fun. It's such a little game, but it packs so much variety and chaos into it. You really can't go wrong with Rounds.

Fun game that I love hopping into with friends for a few rounds at a time. It has a really unique concept that encourages experimenting with different builds and playstyles. I’d love to see an official 4-player mode added in the future so we wouldn’t have to rely on mods to play together.
Good little landfall game, greatly improved with 3 other friends and some mods.

I have an unhealthy obsession with this game
Modding it gave my computer PTSD
10/10 Would Recommend
This is a fantastic game to play with strangers or your singular friend. More than one friend? No problem, this game is really easy to start up modded with Thunderstore to allow up to more players!
A solid game, love the RogueLike mechanics, and the modding community is excellent. 10/10 game.
Amazing game, fun to play with friends or quickplay if your bored.

even after 2 years of playing this game, if I try I can still find new card combinations. and because of the cards being random it almost feels like each game you have to play a little differently. not only is this a good pvp game (the only one i actualy like) its also a surprisingly good social game. every now and then youll meet someone pretty cool and chill. all in all, this game is defintly in my top three
Very fun game, totally worth the small price tag.

Very fun and cool little game with several different builds that you can have fun with breaking the game. 
Haven't tried modded because I generally  like games the way I like my ice cream (Vanilla) however from what I hear thats also really great for the game.

Fun Game, haven't lost 0-5 yet....Kinda difficult achievement to get naturally due to how easy to get a broken build is in this game even with the RNG. Very fun online, Friends playing this recommended...also internet if you dont wanna crowd around a pc with controllers.
it's a fun and action-packed game i enjoy playing with family & friends.

A 1v1 platformer shooter deckbuilder game. Each player will spawn on either side of the map and then fight, the loser of said fight will be granted the opportunity to pick a card that will provide a buff and maybe a debuff of some kind, then you'll fight again. Rounds are best of three and the first to win five rounds is the winner. This is a great game if you have a friend over and need something to do, maps are varied enough and the cards are pretty creative so there's lots of room for build variety. I recommend at market price.
Silly gameplay and broken combos. Wouldn't want it any different.
its really fun and you should get it and play with your friends and stuff

LandFall having lighting in a bottle and then forgetting about it
One of the most unique competitive 2d shooters, really wish there was more added to it.

I love rounds. it is a wonderful game. rounds with friends is a fun mod if you'd like to play with a larger group, although it ends up being much more chaotic if you let the game go for too many "rounds." very good balance of luck and skill, near infinite replayability, it's six dollars. Buy this game if you have friends
I usually don't play online games that often. But the matches here can be so short and the gameplay is so simple yet satisfying that this is one game I always come back to.
its loads of fun for a short little 1v1 to kill the time while talking about anything
The mods for this game are so funny. Instant death simulator lmfaoooo
i usually suck at gun games but i was actually good at this one, pretty beginner friendly and if you are looking at this reveiw than just buy the game

have they updated this game in a while, no

should they update it, yes

should you buy it, yes

Just amazing to play with friends. Base Game stays solid very long, but if that gets boring dont worry there are Mods. One little thing that I dont like is that you can only play with one friend (in the Base Game). 
But overall 10/10
Would recommend
Great game, I think, unfortunately I have no friends and I can never find a random match to play the game properly.

i've only played a couple [b]ROUNDS[/b] of this game because i dont have many friends who consistantly play it, but nonetheless this game is absolute cinema; i really liked the part where one of my friends turned his gun into a tsar bomba launcher and blew everyone up [i](including himself..)[/i]
Fun little game to play with girlfriend. Easy to learn and have fun.
Modding is a bit confusing but overall fun game, Only other thing is that I wish it was crossplay
Great Game, Controller Support would be nice if better.

This game is simply a masterpiece.

The quality of gameplay is simply gorgantuas.

although, i must conclude and say this game is way better with mods.
fun, fast paced 2D shooter for freinds or online. each round is different based off the cards you recieve, so its always fun and not really repetitive

Recommended if and only if you have a friend to play with. The game itself is a fairly fun 2D shooter to play for a couple of hours, where the loser gets to pick an upgrade card in order to gain an advantage the next round. The problem with the game is that the servers are practically empty, so you won't be able to play the game unless you can do so locally or with a friend online.

One time i created a nuclear bomb with a 2500 kilogram payload of pure, enriched uranium, causing multiple charges of terror attacks and war crimes, mass murder. mass panic, and the destruction of 17 countries including 60% of the USA and Russia.
a very cool game, I recommend it to everyone, if you want to play with more than two people, install r2modman and add mods because the pure game is so ok, and with more people and mods it is better
Endless fun as long as you can convince your friends to hop on and let you bully them.
Very fun timekiller but the player base is nonexistent atp
so good man but when press esc on sandbox it just glitch and make me stuck

Very fun and unique game. I played this with my friend and we had a blast. I love how there is so much variety. 10/10.
Great for LAN multiplayer if you have a sibling on the same network, very fun with low requirments
Firstly, add mods. Secondly, use the amazing synergies and strategies. Thirdly, get gud.
Honestly rlly fun, gets boring fast without friends tho
